messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0029",
  "title": "2025Q2",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10"
}

Section text:
## 2025Q2

杖剑传说

iOS流水：5.47

玩家评分：8.6

放置·冒险·竖屏

英勇之地

iOS流水：1.89

玩家评分：4.6

动作·刷宝·联机

永远的蔚蓝星球

iOS流水：4.84

玩家评分：5.9

塔防·合成·策略

雷霆战机：集结

iOS流水：1.43

玩家评分：6.3

街机·弹幕·射击

胜利女神：新的希望

iOS流水：2.10

玩家评分：7.2

二次元·卡牌·养成

全境守卫

iOS流水：0.72

玩家评分：6.9

塔防·割草·解压

message.content:
This section provides a Q2 2025 performance snapshot for six mobile games, structured as a categorical data list. It supports retrieval for questions regarding:
- **Date/Period:** Q2 2025
- **Entities:** 杖剑传说, 英勇之地, 永远的蔚蓝星球, 雷霆战机：集结, 胜利女神：新的希望, 全境守卫
- **Metrics:** iOS revenue (流水) numerical values and player ratings (玩家评分) for each title
- **Topics/Genres:** Gameplay and format classifications (e.g., 放置·冒险·竖屏, 动作·刷宝·联机, 塔防·合成·策略, 街机·弹幕·射击, 二次元·卡牌·养成, 塔防·割草·解压)
- **Evidence Type:** Structured quantitative and categorical data list
The content enables direct lookup, verification, and comparative analysis of Q2 2025 iOS commercial performance, player reception scores, and genre tags for the specified titles. No definitions, procedures, claims, tables, or figures are present in this section.
